summary: Changed LPVaultFactory.implementation from immutable to regular storage. Added scheduleImplementation(), applyImplementation(), cancelScheduledImplementation() with 7-day timelock, pendingImplementation/implementationUnlockAt/implementationVersion storage, IMPLEMENTATION_TIMELOCK constant, 3 events, 3 errors. Updated createVault to pass implementationVersion to initialize(). Extended LPVault.initialize() to accept and store version_ parameter. 23 integration tests covering schedule, apply, cancel, new-vault-version, early-apply revert, no-pending revert, zero-address revert, non-admin revert, and double-schedule guard.
